tools.name: projects.iapProjectsBrandsCreate
tools.description: Constructs a new OAuth brand for the project if one does not exist. The created brand is "internal only", meaning that OAuth clients created under it only accept requests from users who belong to the same Google Workspace organization as the project. The brand is created in an un-reviewed status. NOTE: The "internal only" status can be manually changed in the Google Cloud Console. Requires that a brand does not already exist for the project, and that the specified support email is owned by the caller.

tools.name: projects.iapProjectsBrandsIdentityAwareProxyClientsCreate
tools.description: Creates an Identity Aware Proxy (IAP) OAuth client. The client is owned by IAP. Requires that the brand for the project exists and that it is set for internal-only use.

tools.name: projects.iapProjectsBrandsIdentityAwareProxyClientsList
tools.description: Lists the existing clients for the brand.

tools.name: projects.iapProjectsBrandsIdentityAwareProxyClientsResetSecret
tools.description: Resets an Identity Aware Proxy (IAP) OAuth client secret. Useful if the secret was compromised. Requires that the client is owned by IAP.

tools.name: projects.iapProjectsBrandsList
tools.description: Lists the existing brands for the project.

tools.name: projects.iapProjectsIapTunnelLocationsDestGroupsList
tools.description: Lists the existing TunnelDestGroups. To group across all locations, use a `-` as the location ID. For example: `/v1/projects/123/iap_tunnel/locations/-/destGroups`

tools.name: v1.iapGetIamPolicy
tools.description: Gets the access control policy for an Identity-Aware Proxy protected resource. More information about managing access via IAP can be found at: https://cloud.google.com/iap/docs/managing-access#managing_access_via_the_api

tools.name: v1.iapGetIapSettings
tools.description: Gets the IAP settings on a particular IAP protected resource.

tools.name: v1.iapSetIamPolicy
tools.description: Sets the access control policy for an Identity-Aware Proxy protected resource. Replaces any existing policy. More information about managing access via IAP can be found at: https://cloud.google.com/iap/docs/managing-access#managing_access_via_the_api

tools.name: v1.iapTestIamPermissions
tools.description: Returns permissions that a caller has on the Identity-Aware Proxy protected resource. More information about managing access via IAP can be found at: https://cloud.google.com/iap/docs/managing-access#managing_access_via_the_api

tools.name: v1.iapUpdateIapSettings
tools.description: Updates the IAP settings on a particular IAP protected resource. It replaces all fields unless the `update_mask` is set.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
